text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the final day of summer camp, and Air Shakur
continues to train until the very last second.
choice_data_list: We should probably head back now.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I was just thinkin'...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The last time we came here was after the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: We've changed. You and me both.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You almost keeled over last year. That means you
must've learned something.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
According to Parcae's calculations, I had a zero
percent chance of makin' it this far.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But stack enough 0.01 millimeter increments and
you'll get one millimeter eventually.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Once you reach one millimeter, the way you
compile the rest is up to you. That's freedom.
choice_data_list: In that case, you can still grow even stronger.
In that case, you can still grow even stronger.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Well, guess you could say I'm used to it.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Security Officer
text_block_list.text:
Forgive my impertinence, Your Highness, but I fear you
might hurt yourself if you focus so intently.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
While I appreciate your concern, I assure you I
can handle this much without issue.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I want to savor this wonderful sensation a little
longer. It feels like my heart is riding the wind and
soaring far into the unknown...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That is to say, one more lap and I'll call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list: She really loves running, doesn't she?
She really loves running, doesn't she?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Meh. Not as much as carrying out her duty,
apparently.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I believe that if I do what I must, the two of us will
see eye-to-eye one day.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: So annoyin'.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if Air Shakur views Fine Motion as
resigning herself to fate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In truth, I don't know anything for sure right now.
However, if there's anything she doesn't like, she
deals with it. On that note...
choice_data_list:
You could explain your point of view to her,
you know.

You could explain your point of view to her,
you know.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list:
She might change her mind when she sees what
you do now.

She might change her mind when she sees what
you do now.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Zero percent chance that happens.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Zilch. Although, if she did...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, it'll be a pain if she sees us here. Let's
go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so ends Shakur's senior-year summer camp.
